controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: Information security policy and topic-specific policies are defined, approved, published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel, and reviewed at planned intervals.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Information security roles and responsibilities are defined and allocated according to the organization's needs.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility are segregated to reduce the risk of fraud, error and unauthorized activity.

controls.title: Management responsibilities
controls.description: Management requires all personnel to apply information security in accordance with the established policies, topic-specific policies and procedures.

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.description: Appropriate contacts with relevant authorities are established and maintained.

controls.title: Contact with special interest groups
controls.description: Appropriate contacts with special interest groups, security forums and professional associations are established and maintained.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.description: Information relating to information security threats is collected and analysed to produce actionable threat intelligence.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: Information security is integrated into project management regardless of the type of project.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners, is developed and maintained.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information and other associated assets are identified, documented and implemented.

controls.title: Return of assets
controls.description: Personnel and other interested parties return all the organization's assets in their possession upon change or termination of their employment, contract or agreement.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: Information is classified according to its confidentiality, integrity, availability and relevant interested-party requirements.

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling is developed and implemented in accordance with the classification scheme.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.description: Information transfer rules, procedures and agreements are in place for all types of transfer facilities within the organization and with external parties.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets are established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: The full life cycle of identities is managed.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.description: Allocation and management of authentication information is controlled, including advising personnel on proper handling.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.description: Access rights to information and other associated assets are provisioned, reviewed, modified and removed in accordance with the access control policy.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: Processes and procedures are defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the use of suppliers' products or services.

controls.title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
controls.description: Relevant information security requirements are established and agreed with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.

controls.title: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
controls.description: Processes and procedures are defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain.

controls.title: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
controls.description: The organization regularly monitors, reviews, evaluates and manages change in suppliers' information security practices and service delivery.

controls.title: Information security for cloud services
controls.description: Acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services are governed by the organization's information security requirements.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.description: The organization plans and prepares for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating incident management processes, roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Assessment and decision on information security events
controls.description: Information security events are assessed and it is decided whether they are to be categorized as information security incidents.

controls.title: Response to information security incidents
controls.description: Information security incidents are responded to in accordance with the documented procedures.

controls.title: Learning from information security incidents
controls.description: Knowledge gained from information security incidents is used to strengthen and improve the information security controls.

controls.title: Collection of evidence
controls.description: The organization establishes and implements procedures for the identification, collection, acquisition and preservation of evidence related to information security events.

controls.title: Information security during disruption
controls.description: The organization plans how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.

controls.title: ICT readiness for business continuity
controls.description: ICT readiness is planned, implemented, maintained and tested based on business continuity objectives.

controls.title: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
controls.description: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the organization's approach to meet them are identified, documented and kept up to date.

controls.title: Intellectual property rights
controls.description: The organization implements appropriate procedures to protect intellectual property rights.

controls.title: Protection of records
controls.description: Records are protected from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized release.

controls.title: Privacy and protection of personal identifiable information (PII)
controls.description: The organization identifies and meets the requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and protection of PII according to applicable laws, regulations and contractual requirements.

controls.title: Independent review of information security
controls.description: The organization's approach to managing information security and its implementation are reviewed independently at planned intervals and when significant changes occur.

controls.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security
controls.description: Compliance with the organization's information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules and standards is regularly reviewed.

controls.title: Documented operating procedures
controls.description: Operating procedures for information processing facilities are documented and made available to personnel who need them.

controls.title: Screening
controls.description: Background verification checks on all candidates to become personnel are carried out prior to joining and on an ongoing basis, proportional to business requirements, classification of information and perceived risks.

controls.title: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.description: The employment contractual agreements state the personnel's and the organization's responsibilities for information security.

controls.title: Information security awareness & training
controls.description: Personnel receive appropriate security awareness education and training relevant to their role and function.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: A disciplinary process is formalized and communicated to take actions against personnel and other relevant interested parties who have committed an information security policy violation.

controls.title: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
controls.description: Information security responsibilities and duties that remain valid after termination or change of employment are defined, enforced and communicated to relevant personnel and other interested parties.

controls.title: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
controls.description: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements reflecting the organization's needs for the protection of information are identified, documented, regularly reviewed and signed by personnel and other relevant interested parties.

controls.title: Remote working
controls.description: Security measures are implemented when personnel are working remotely to protect information accessed, processed or stored outside the organization's premises.

controls.title: Information security event reporting
controls.description: The organization provides a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Security perimeters are defined and used to protect areas that contain information and other associated assets.

controls.title: Physical entry
controls.description: Secure areas are protected by appropriate entry controls and access points.

controls.title: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
controls.description: Physical security for offices, rooms and facilities is designed and implemented.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: Premises are continuously monitored for unauthorized physical access.

controls.title: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
controls.description: Protection against physical and environmental threats, such as natural disasters and other intentional or unintentional physical threats to infrastructure, is designed and implemented.

controls.title: Working in secure areas
controls.description: Security measures for working in secure areas are designed and implemented.

controls.title: Clear desk and clear screen
controls.description: Clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information processing facilities are defined and appropriately enforced.

controls.title: Equipment siting and protection
controls.description: Equipment is sited securely and protected.

controls.title: Security of assets off-premises
controls.description: Assets used off-premises are protected.

controls.title: Storage media
controls.description: Storage media is managed through its life cycle of acquisition, use, transportation and disposal in accordance with the classification scheme and handling requirements.

controls.title: Supporting utilities
controls.description: Information processing facilities are protected from power failures and other disruptions caused by failures in supporting utilities.

controls.title: Cabling security
controls.description: Cables carrying power, data or supporting information services are protected from interception, interference or damage.

controls.title: Equipment maintenance
controls.description: Equipment is maintained correctly to ensure availability, integrity and confidentiality of information.

controls.title: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
controls.description: Items of equipment containing storage media are verified to ensure that any sensitive data and licensed software has been removed or securely overwritten prior to disposal or re-use.

controls.title: User endpoint devices
controls.description: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices is protected.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights are restricted and managed.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets is restricted in accordance with the established topic-specific policy on access control.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.description: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries is appropriately managed.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures are implemented based on access restrictions and the access control policy.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: The use of resources is monitored and adjusted in line with current and expected capacity requirements.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protection against malware is implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities is obtained, the organization's exposure evaluated, and appropriate measures taken.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks are established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.description: Information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media is deleted when no longer required.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.description: Data masking is used in accordance with the topic-specific policy on access control and other related topic-specific policies and business requirements, taking applicable legislation into consideration.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures are applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.description: Backup copies of information, software and systems are maintained and regularly tested in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.

controls.title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.description: Information processing facilities are implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Logs recording activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events are produced, stored, protected and analysed.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems and applications are monitored for anomalous behaviour to evaluate potential security incidents.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.description: The clocks of information processing systems used by the organization are synchronized to approved time sources.

controls.title: Use of privileged utility programs
controls.description: The use of utility programs that can be capable of overriding system and application controls is restricted and tightly controlled.

controls.title: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.description: Procedures and measures are implemented to securely manage software installation on operational systems.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: Networks and network devices are secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.description: Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services are identified, implemented and monitored.

controls.title: Segregation of networks
controls.description: Groups of information services, users and information systems are segregated in the organization's networks.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.description: Access to external websites is managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including key management, are defined and implemented.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems are established and applied.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.description: Information security requirements are identified, specified and approved when developing or acquiring applications.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.description: Principles for engineering secure systems are established, documented, maintained and applied to any information system development activities.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.description: Secure coding principles are applied to software development to reduce vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.description: Security testing processes are defined and implemented in the development life cycle.

controls.title: Outsourced development
controls.description: The organization directs, monitors and reviews the activities related to outsourced system development.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.description: Development, testing and production environments are separated and secured.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Changes to information processing facilities and information systems are subject to change management procedures.

controls.title: Test information
controls.description: Test information is appropriately selected, protected and managed.

controls.title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.description: Audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems are planned and agreed between the tester and appropriate management.
